title: New function is too long
diff:
diff --git a/handler.py b/handler.py
--- a/handler.py
+++ b/handler.py
@@ -10,3 +10,53 @@ def handle_request(req):
+def process_order(order):
+    # Validate
+    if not order.id:
+        return None
+    if not order.items:
+        return None
+    total = 0
+    for item in order.items:
+        total += item.price
+    # Apply discount
+    if order.coupon:
+        total *= 0.9
+    # Calculate tax
+    tax = total * 0.08
+    total += tax
+    # Create invoice
+    invoice = Invoice()
+    invoice.order_id = order.id
+    invoice.total = total
+    # Save
+    db.save(invoice)
+    # Send email
+    email_service.send(order.user.email, "Order confirmed")
+    # Log
+    logger.info(f"Order {order.id} processed")
+    # Update inventory
+    for item in order.items:
+        inventory = db.query(Inventory).filter_by(sku=item.sku).first()
+        inventory.quantity -= 1
+        db.save(inventory)
+    # Update stats
+    stats_service.record_sale(order)
+    # Schedule delivery
+    delivery_service.schedule(order)
+    # Generate receipt
+    receipt = PDFGenerator.create_receipt(invoice)
+    storage.upload(receipt)
+    # Cleanup
+    cart_service.clear(order.user_id)
+    return invoice

ground_truth.description: New function process_order is ~50 lines. Should be split into smaller functions (validate, calculate, notify).
